title: Roy Boston
compiled_truth: Roy Boston is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-21 to 2001-12-03), Roy Boston sent 13 and received 354 emails, totalling 367 interactions. Top correspondents: [Janine Migden](people/janine-migden) (8), [Rshapiro](people/rshapiro) (6), [Jsteffe](people/jsteffe) (4), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (2), [Steve Montovano](people/steve-montovano) (2). Mailbox folders observed: deleted_items, inbox, michigan, midwest.
